title: Curriculum Vitae
subtitle: Minimalist CV site in Elm, focused on content, readability, and a clean black-on-white presentation.

about.label: Languages
about.value: Java, Go, Kotlin, Processing, D, Gleam

about.label: Stack
about.value: Gin, Gorm, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Redis, p5js, Ktor

items.value: Ixion is a statically typed language with algebraic data types that targets JVM bytecode. I implemented the parser, type system, and code generation.
Other related work includes Neva and Lazurite, plus compiler tooling such as Tulang, Lino, and Jasgo.
I was a maintainer in TheAlgorithms community for Kotlin and built a repository for popular algorithms in D.
Recent rendering work includes Zont, a Go engine capable of rendering 3D models in the console.

timeline.body: Started programming on Scratch at age 10, participated in events, and won prizes.
Moved to Java, worked with game development and Processing, and briefly worked as a game developer.
Focused on web applications, compilers, interpreters, and languages. Moved gradually from game development to engine development.
Continued studying languages and systems that interest me, including Gleam, D, Neva, and Elixir.
